tool_args.label: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics - January 2024

payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics report prepared for the January 2024 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee.

extra_fields.prepared_for: New York City Transit & Bus Committee

evidence_refs.source_quote: This performance metrics document was prepared for the January 2024 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee.
2 Broadway • New York, NY 10004 Monday, January 29, 2024
NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
January 2024

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Richard Davey, President, New York City Transit

evidence_refs.source_quote: Richard Davey President, New York City Transit

payload.description: New York City Transit (NYCT) operates all subways and buses in New York City.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.
the Department of Buses (DOB) team who provided supplemental service during the disruptions

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

evidence_refs.source_quote: team members in the Department of Subways (DOS) and Office of System Safety (OSS)

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Paratransit service for customers with disabilities.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Access-A-Ride customers are in good hands. The Paratransit Command Center monitors and responds to customers' needs

payload.description: December paid weekday subway ridership averaged 3.58 million

evidence_refs.source_quote: December paid weekday subway ridership averaged 3.58 million, down from 3.78 million in November

payload.description: December set a new monthly high, at 67.4% of pre-COVID ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: December set a new monthly high, at 67.4% of pre-COVID ridership

payload.description: December paid weekday bus ridership also dropped, as expected, from 1.30 million to 1.19 million

evidence_refs.source_quote: December paid weekday bus ridership also dropped, as expected, from 1.30 million to 1.19 million

payload.description: The comparison to 2019 figures was stable vs November, at 59.5%

evidence_refs.source_quote: The comparison to 2019 figures was stable vs November, at 59.5%

payload.description: Preliminary weekday bus ridership which includes all bus riders is estimated at 2.45 million

evidence_refs.source_quote: Preliminary weekday bus ridership which includes all bus riders is estimated at 2.45 million

payload.description: December 2023 weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 79.5%, down 2.9 points from November

evidence_refs.source_quote: For December 2023, weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 79.5%, down 2.9 points from November

payload.description: For the full year, weekday OTP was 82.9%, the highest in over ten years

evidence_refs.source_quote: For the full year, weekday OTP was 82.9%, the highest in over ten years

tool_args.label: December 2023 Subway Customer Journey Time Performance

payload.description: the percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule (CJTP) fell to 82.8%

evidence_refs.source_quote: the percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule (CJTP) fell to 82.8%

payload.description: Weekend performance in December remained high; 84% of trains arrived on time in December, up from 83.7% in November

evidence_refs.source_quote: 84% of trains arrived on time in December, up from 83.7% in November

payload.description: Bus Service Delivered, at 94.5%, remained relatively unchanged from December 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Service Delivered, at 94.5%, remained relatively unchanged from December 2022

tool_args.label: December 2023 Bus Customer Journey Time Performance

payload.description: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP), at 70.5% in December, was up by 1 percentage point from last month

evidence_refs.source_quote: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP), at 70.5% in December, was up by 1 percentage point from last month

payload.description: Access-A-Ride (Paratransit) overall satisfaction in December is 73%, matching September and October scores

evidence_refs.source_quote: Access-A-Ride (Paratransit) overall satisfaction in December is 73%, matching September and October scores

payload.description: The overall subway satisfaction rate for December is 59%, in line with where it has been around since June

evidence_refs.source_quote: The overall subway satisfaction rate for December is 59%

payload.description: Overall bus satisfaction in December is 60%, consistent with September and October

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overall bus satisfaction in December is 60%, consistent with September and October

payload.description: Bus speeds averaged 8.1 mph on a 12-month period

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus speeds averaged 8.1 mph on a 12-month period

payload.description: Additional Platform Time (APT) increased to 90 seconds

evidence_refs.source_quote: both additional platform time (APT) and additional train time (ATT) increased to 90 seconds and 32 seconds respectively

payload.description: Additional Train Time (ATT) increased to 32 seconds

evidence_refs.source_quote: both additional platform time (APT) and additional train time (ATT) increased to 90 seconds and 32 seconds respectively

payload.description: Subways has a goal of 84.6% On-Time Performance in 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subways has a goal of 84.6% On-Time Performance in 2024

payload.description: Paratransit will seek to reach a historic 94% 20-minute OTP in 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: Paratransit will seek to reach a historic 94% 20-minute OTP in 2024

payload.raw_value_text: 95% rate of calls answered in 60 seconds or less
payload.description: Paratransit's goal is a 95% rate of calls answered in 60 seconds or less

evidence_refs.source_quote: Paratransit's goal is a 95% rate of calls answered in 60 seconds or less

payload.description: our primary carrier service completed 89% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window

evidence_refs.source_quote: our primary carrier service completed 89% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window from the promised time

payload.description: On broker service, we completed 90% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window from the promised time

evidence_refs.source_quote: On broker service, we completed 90% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window from the promised time

payload.description: NYCT's North Star goal of 70% customer satisfaction

evidence_refs.source_quote: our North Star goal of 70% customer satisfaction

payload.description: For primary carrier service, the No-Show Rate was at 0.60 no shows per 1,000 trips

evidence_refs.source_quote: For primary carrier service, the No-Show Rate was at 0.60 no shows per 1,000 trips

payload.description: For broker service, the result for December 2023 was 1.30 no-shows per 1,000 scheduled trips

evidence_refs.source_quote: For broker service, the result for December 2023 was 1.30 no-shows per 1,000 scheduled trips

payload.description: We plan to stabilize operator availability by hiring 2,000 new bus operators to support our daily operations and shuttle services

evidence_refs.source_quote: we plan to stabilize operator availability by hiring 2,000 new bus operators to support our daily operations and shuttle services

tool_args.label: 2024 Goal: 350 R211 Cars Entering Subway Service

payload.raw_value_text: 350 R211 cars entering service in the subway
payload.description: 350 R211 cars entering service in the subway and 75 R211S cars entering service on the Staten Island Railway

evidence_refs.source_quote: 350 R211 cars entering service in the subway and 75 R211S cars entering service on the Staten Island Railway

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Proposed Final Plan

payload.description: Seeks to modernize the borough's bus network through a comprehensive redesign to deliver faster, more frequent, and more reliable service. Proposed Final Plan announced in December 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: announce the release of the Queens Bus Network Redesign Proposed Final Plan, which seeks to modernize the borough's bus network through a comprehensive redesign to deliver faster, more frequent, and more reliable service.

payload.description: OP is preparing the Proposed Final Plan based on the nearly 8,000 comments received in late 2022 and 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: For Brooklyn, OP is preparing the Proposed Final Plan based on the nearly 8,000 comments received in late 2022 and 2023.

payload.description: Expansion of ACE program beyond bus lanes to vehicles blocking bus stops and double-parked vehicles. Cameras added to up to 1,000 buses and enforced on 28 bus routes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Beginning in May, we will expand the Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) program beyond bus lanes, which will extend traffic enforcement to vehicles blocking bus stops as well as double-parked vehicles. Cameras will be added to up to 1,000 buses and enforced on 28 bus routes later in the year.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

payload.description: In Q1 of 2024, we aim to re-NEW-vate 13 stations. Another 50 stations being Re-New-Vated in 2024, starting with 66 St-Lincoln Center on the 1 line.

evidence_refs.source_quote: In Q1 of 2024, we aim to re-NEW-vate 13 stations
customers can look forward to another 50 stations being Re-New-Vated, starting with 66 St-Lincoln Center on the 1 line

payload.description: LED light conversions will start in February for all stations – not only providing savings but ensuring a safer station environment

evidence_refs.source_quote: LED light conversions will start in February for all stations
LED lighting will begin to be deployed system-wide in 2024

payload.description: Delivery of 60 zero-emission battery-electric buses at four depots retrofitted with charging dispensers and electrical infrastructure. Milestone in commitment to all zero-emission fleet by 2040.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Later in 2024, the next generation of bus technology will come online at NYCT, as it accepts the delivery of 60 zero-emission battery-electric buses at four depots retrofitted with charging dispensers and electrical infrastructure.

payload.description: First of four pilot stations receiving platform barriers at 191 St on the 1 line

evidence_refs.source_quote: the first of four pilot stations receiving platform barriers at 191 St on the 1 earlier this month

payload.description: Expansion of ACE program beyond bus lanes to vehicles blocking bus stops and double-parked vehicles. Cameras added to up to 1,000 buses and enforced on 28 bus routes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Beginning in May, we will expand the Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) program beyond bus lanes

payload.description: Fully funded Phase II of the Second Ave Subway
